title: CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test
author: skoeva

findings.description: Commit subject 'CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test' uses uppercase prefix and is missing SubArea. Should be 'ci: plugins-test: Parallelize and speed up'.
make plugins-test no longer runs npm ci for headlamp-plugin before test-headlamp-plugin.js. Local runs on a fresh checkout may fail without documented prerequisite.
Three parallel CI jobs with separate cache-dependency-path entries improve cache hit rate.
TARBALL path resolved before cd to avoid worker race conditions in xargs -P parallelism.
npm install replaced by npm ci for reproducible installs from lockfile.
